visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long reddish-brown hair is sitting on a black leather couch in a modern indoor environment with glass railings and white pillars in the background. She is wearing a white long-sleeved button-up shirt and a dark grey skirt, with a grey fringed scarf on her lap. On a small round wooden table in front of her are three white iPhone boxes. (2) The camera zooms in as her hands, featuring manicured nails with flower accents, pick up a white box showing the blue iPhone 15 Pro. She rotates the box to show the back side containing specifications and barcodes. (3) The scene shifts to a top-down view of her hands peeling the white paper adhesive strips off the top and bottom of the box. (4) She lifts the box lid to reveal the blue titanium iPhone 15 Pro inside. (5) She picks up the phone to show the triple-camera array and the matte blue back. (6) The video cuts to show three phones side-by-side in their boxes: white titanium, blue titanium, and natural titanium/orange. (7) She holds up the white titanium iPhone in a clear protective case, turning it to catch the light. (8) Close-up on the white iPhone held in her hand, showing the front screen and the silver edges of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 薯條姐開箱. (2) [Subtitle]: iPhone 15 Pro 全系列顏色耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 今天不看車. (4) [Subtitle]: 今天開手機. (5) [Subtitle]: 哎呦! 藍色. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇我的天呐. (7) [Subtitle]: 你儀式感滿滿耶. (8) [Subtitle]: 好像不符合我的風格. (9) [Subtitle]: 幫大家挑一下.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is present throughout the unboxing.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brownish-red hair, wearing a professional white button-down shirt, a black skirt, and a grey scarf on her lap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern indoor mall or corporate building with large glass railings overlooking lower floors, white architectural pillars, and soft overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Female voice introduces the video with high energy and a bright pitch. Background music is a playful, mid-tempo electronic pop track. (2) Male voice joins, sounding casual and conversational, creating a dialogue atmosphere. (3) SFX: A sharp 'ding' sound effect occurs as text overlays appear. (4) SFX: Distinct 'crackle' and 'peel' sounds are heard as the paper strips are removed from the iPhone box, with vocals ducking slightly to emphasize the tactile audio. (5) Laughter track SFX plays briefly as the woman reacts to the phone's color. (6) Music remains continuous as both speakers discuss the aesthetic of the different iPhone colors with high vocal variability and excitement.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and compare the physical appearance and color options of the iPhone 15 Pro series through a casual unboxing format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed unboxing of multiple units of the same brand new product, mentioning the brand and color specs clearly.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media-style editing with colorful subtitles and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a tech unboxing.
